hooks.command: node -e "process.stdout.write('--- Auto-compiling after claim mutation ---\n')" && npx -y @grainulation/wheat compile

node -e "const p=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_HOOK_CONTEXT||'{}'); if((p.tool_input?.file_path||'').includes('.wheat/')){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Direct writes to .wheat/ are not allowed. Use wheat MCP tools.\n');process.exit(1)}"
